name: Daily Information Report
description: Collects daily information from multiple apps and sends a summary via WhatsApp

steps.goal: Search for unread emails. Use read_screen to collect subject lines and preview text. Copy all unread email information to clipboard.
Open today's date. Use read_screen to collect all events for today. Copy calendar events to clipboard.
Search for 'weather today'. Read the temperature and forecast. Copy weather information to clipboard.

Search for contact 'YOUR_NAME_HERE'. Open the chat. Type 'Daily Report:' followed by newline. Then paste the summary of emails, calendar, and weather from clipboard. Use submit_message to send the message.
